BatchRunSpec.description: Batch run entry using the same canonical envelope fields as RunCreate.
BatchRunSpec.title: BatchRunSpec

RunCreate.description:
Canonical run submission envelope.

Frontend and agent tools post ``{values, options}`` keyed by form field ids
derived from ``/workflows/{id}/form-spec``. The backend translates those
into engine-ready inputs via ``run_envelope_bridge``.
RunCreate.title: RunCreate

get.description: Stream a file inside the allowed roots for preview or download.
Return preview metadata and text contents when available.

List the immediate children of a directory inside the allowed roots.

Read-only and confined by :class:`FilesystemPolicy` to repo_root /
bioinfoflow_home. Lazy (one level): the Files tab requests subdirectories on
expand rather than streaming the whole tree.
Get or create the workspace default (uncategorized) project.

post.description:
Submit a run via the canonical envelope.

Accepts only ``{project_id, workflow_id, values, options}``. Values are
keyed by the form-field ids in ``GET /workflows/{id}/form-spec``; paths,
tables, and scalars are native JSON. The server resolves ``asset://``
URIs to absolute paths during translation.

get.description:
Server-sent events feed for the live resource monitor.

Emits a combined frame (resources + enriched active_runs + queue_depth)
every ~2 s. Heartbeat ``: ping\n\n`` on a 15 s idle timeout. Cleans up
on client disconnect.

Unlike ``/events/stream``, this feed is host-scoped (not project-scoped):
resource snapshots describe the backend host, not a tenant's project.

Dashboard statistics aggregating runs, workflows, images, and projects.
Returns counts and recent activity for the dashboard overview.
Browse local filesystem directories for admin-only external roots.
Get detailed GPU status and compatibility info.
Get real-time GPU metrics for monitoring.
Lightweight liveness probe. No external calls — suitable for Docker HEALTHCHECK.
First-run readiness checklist for web onboarding and ``bif doctor``.

post.description: Validate workflow content and return parsed schema + DAG without persisting.

get.description: Get workflow DAG data for visualization.

Return the deterministic FormSpec used to render the run wizard.

Lazily backfills `Workflow.form_spec` if missing, so legacy workflows
that pre-date the column work without a one-shot migration script.
